title: Displayer
description: Displayer Client Mod, lets you show custom text in screen
body:
# Displayer

[![Minecraft Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.11+-blue.svg)](https://www.minecraft.net/)

Displayer is a lightweight client-side mod designed to render **text displays and timers** in-game.

## ✨ What you can do

🖥️ **Display custom text** on screen with simple styling support  
⏰ **Create and manage timers** with live countdowns  
🎨 **Render clean UI elements** directly in-game  

## 🔄 How it works

Displayer receives custom data packets from a server (or external system) and renders them on the client side.  
All visual logic is handled locally, keeping performance smooth and the server completely vanilla-compatible.

## ⚙️ Requirements

- **Minecraft**: 1.21.11+  
- **Fabric Loader** (compatible version)  
- Optional: server/plugin or external system to send data  
- Displayer is **fully client-side**

## 🔧 For developers

### Basic integration

```java
// Example: sending a text display packet
public void displayText(Player player, String text, int x, int y) {
    String message = "text;" + text + ";" + x + ";" + y + ";1.0;true";
    player.sendPluginMessage(this, "displayer:text", message.getBytes());
}

````



<details>
<summary>Old Version 1.21.1-1.21.4</summary>

# Displayer

[![Minecraft Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.1+-blue.svg)](https://www.minecraft.net/)

Displayer is a mod specifically designed to display texts on screen.

## ✨ What you can do

🖥️ **Display dynamic text** on screen with visual effects  
⏰ **Create interactive timers** with progress bars  
🎯 **Manage quests** with objectives and visual progress  
🔧 **Handle customizable server variables**  
🎨 **Design immersive content** with colors and animations  

## 🔄 How it works

Displayer receives custom data packets from a Paper server and responds on the client side — from UI rendering to interactive messages and player controls. All logic and visual elements remain on the client side, ensuring a vanilla server experience.

## ⚙️ Requirements

- **Minecraft**: 1.21.1  
- **Fabric Loader**: 0.17.2+  
- **Compatible server plugin** to send packets  
- Displayer is **purely a client-side mod**  

## 🔧 For developers

### Basic integration
```java
// In your server plugin
public void displayText(Player player, String text, int x, int y) {
    String message = "welcome;" + text + ";" + x + ";" + y + ";1.0;true;true";
    player.sendPluginMessage(this, "displayer:text", message.getBytes());
}



</details>
